rows.summary: The package now contains an explicit governance model and execution contract.
Root human-facing guidance files are present and distinguish orientation, status, actions, and audit/governance flow.
A first invariant registry exists for the highest-risk semantic boundaries.
Contradiction register items remain resolved or intentionally classified.
Duplication is classified and intentional where the human-facing layer overlaps for navigation reasons.
No runnable implementation baseline exists yet; the package remains intentionally pre-code.
